programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain eats the world's first robot-made hamburger at Creator Burger and helps save the planet by driving an electric semi truck with zero carbon emissions at XOS Trucks; a high-tech tattoo with wearable UV sensors at LogicInk.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain brings joy to the world dressed up as Black Santa when he hooks up with company founder Baron Davis; T-Pain becomes a demon for his first virtual reality concert with Wave VR, then takes some monster jumps in a monster truck with DUB.

programme.title: Tehranto
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a painter and a young medical student as they argue over what it means to be Iranian in Canada.

programme.title: The Extraordinary Journey of the Fakir
programme.desc: An Indian street magician travels to France to find his estranged father.

programme.desc: Khayda is worried about some spots; Emilio is worried he's having too much fun in bed; Elle seeks advice on how to have a pain-free sex life.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.desc: Experts cut through the taboos about young people's sexual health.

programme.title: A Sexplanation
programme.desc: To right the wrongs of his American sex education, 36-year-old health reporter Alex Liu goes on a quest to uncover naked truths and call for more comprehensive sex education for everyone.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Visiting an upscale spa to learn the latest innovations for pampering vagina; learning how a mom-and-pop waxing salon brings in customers.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Rico Nasty and WeezyWTF visit The Pleasure Chest to find out what all the buzz is about; she helps her friend make a mold of his own genitals.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: The Tragic Downfall
programme.desc: Diving into the life and struggles of singer and songwriter Amy Winehouse.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Alex goes on a karaoke date with Kevin, but is sad to learn that Kevin invited some friends.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Allie falls for a handsome pilot who lives in her building. But when he disappears Allie is left heartbroken until he shows up again. Dorian goes on a date with a girl who has a Jekyll and Hyde-like personality.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Becky G chops it up with her little sister Stephanie as they share memories with Grandma, talk about her first performance, and what it takes to make it.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Dumbfounded and Kitty cook up kimchi and milanesa; they reminisce on some of his favorite meals growing up and share his elementary school rituals.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Tinashe visits her childhood home to get her dad and brother's help making a classic family recipe as they share funny family facts and reflect on her career.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia reunites with her father; the team rocks Buku Fest.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Team Freedia shoots a video for Dangerous and prepares for a European tour; Queen Diva suffers a career-threatening injury.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Queen Diva returns with bigger goals and a new manager to help make her dreams come true, but tension with Melvin could derail their plans; Flash and Skip form a musical group with DJ Juan; Devon pursues the idea of marrying Freedia.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia prepares for her first major movie role; Devon works up the courage to surprise his Queen with a proposal at her star-studded birthday party.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia and Devon can't decide on details for their dream wedding; a phone call from Beyoncé; a homeless Flash.

programme.title: Tupac & Biggie: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Presenting the stories of rappers and rivals Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls.

programme.title: The Life and Death of Tupac Shakur
programme.desc: Seen as a poet whose tales of urban alienation captivated young people of all races and backgrounds, Tupac Shakur sets the stage for the current and continuing evolution of the hip-hop phenomenon.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Comedian King Keraun Harris is on a journey to fully immerse himself in white culture; competitive dodgeball; curling; latte art; rock-a-billies.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Keraun runs with wolves, goes on a stroll with a professional dog walker and sits down with a pet psychic.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain eats the world's first robot-made hamburger at Creator Burger and helps save the planet by driving an electric semi truck with zero carbon emissions at XOS Trucks; a high-tech tattoo with wearable UV sensors at LogicInk.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain brings joy to the world dressed up as Black Santa when he hooks up with company founder Baron Davis; T-Pain becomes a demon for his first virtual reality concert with Wave VR, then takes some monster jumps in a monster truck with DUB.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain learns how to go from rags to riches as he makes slime; he discovers secret menu items at restaurants around Los Angeles; T-Pain paints a pair of kicks.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain goes back to school with a Sex Ed expert before throwing a Texas-sized pep rally for high school gamers.

programme.title: Hip-Hop Houdini
programme.desc: Magician Smoothini meets Iggy Azalea at a photo shoot in LA where she sets the bar high, challenging him to create the perfect magic trick; his quest reaches its climax at The Wiltern Theatre, a landmark in Iggy's career.

programme.title: Hip-Hop Houdini
programme.desc: Magician Smoothini gets up close and personal with rapper, wine connoisseur and hockey fan Lil Jon; Smoothini caters to his tastes at an LA winery, before performing his highlight trick with some icy wizardry at the local hockey rink.

programme.title: Hip-Hop Houdini
programme.desc: Magician Smoothini drops in on Waka Flocka Flame's Atlanta home to entertain him, his crew and his family; by performing personally customized tricks, Smooth gets to know the real Waka, and uses magic to make him feel like a kid again.

programme.title: Hip-Hop Houdini
programme.desc: Magician Smoothini heads to rap star Becky G's family home in LA, performing magic tricks with a personal touch; Becky G tells Smoothini about the importance of family, and her struggles on the way to making it big in the music business.

programme.title: Freedia Got a Gun
programme.desc: Devastated after learning her brother Adam was murdered, New Orleans bounce legend Big Freedia uses her platform to raise awareness about the complexities of gun violence, a nationwide epidemic that disproportionally harm Black communities.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: The life of Jamaican Robert Nesta Marley, known around the globe as reggae musician Bob Marley.

programme.desc: Tinashe visits her childhood home to get her dad and brother's help making a classic family recipe as they share funny family facts and reflect on her career.

programme.desc: Smino makes his favorite Southern dish with his mom, Joyce, as they talk about his first performance and reminisce on childhood memories.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia courts controversy when a concert in Mississippi gets canceled for excessive twerking; the team prepares to debut new music from the Queen Diva's upcoming album; Tootie gives back to the community.
